embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
# 🌊 The Biggest Update We've Ever Dropped

Since day one the mission's been simple: give players what they need to win, and never charge for it.

Today we're going bigger than ever.

### 🗺️ Drop Map Production Is Scaling 4X
More maps, twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan waiting.

**And the bar keeps climbing.** We've watched this community grow from first wins to first earnings, and the skill in here is unreal now. The better you get, the faster the meta moves at the top — so we're not just keeping pace. We're opening a market nobody else has touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes — New Territory
The drop map market? We built it. Loot routes? Us too. Now we're pioneering surge routes — and like everything we make, it's completely free.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt From Scratch
This isn't a patch, it's a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan, drop to dub:
- Where to rotate, and exactly when
- Where to base up and hold safe
- What loot to grab first
- How to position when the game's on the line

### 💜 Run `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop. It's the fuel that keeps all of this coming — straight back to you.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX

after.content:

More maps, twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan waiting.

We've watched players in here go from nothing to cashing their first earnings and climbing the PR ranks — the skill in this community is on another level now. And the higher you climb, the faster things move at the top. So we're not just keeping pace. We're opening a market nobody else has touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes — New Territory
The drop map market? We built it. Loot routes? Us too. Now we're pioneering surge routes — and like everything we make, it's completely free.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt From Scratch
This isn't a patch, it's a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan, drop to dub:
- Where to rotate, and exactly when
- Where to base up and hold safe
- What loot to grab first
- How to position when the game's on the line

### 💜 Run `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop. It's the fuel that keeps all of this coming — straight back to you.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX

before.content:
# 🌊 Our Biggest Update Yet

The mission's never changed: give players what they need to win, free.

### 🗺️ Drop Maps — Now 4X Bigger
Twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan.

The skill in here keeps climbing — players going from nothing to their first earnings and up the PR ranks. The higher you climb, the faster the top moves. So we're opening a market nobody's touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes — New Territory
We built the drop map market. We built loot routes. Now we're pioneering surge routes — free, like always.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt
Not a patch — a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan:
- When and where to rotate
- Where to base up
- What loot to grab first
- How to position for endgame

### 💜 Run `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop — it's what keeps this coming.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
# 🌊 Our Biggest Update Yet

The mission's never changed: give players what they need to win, free.

### 🗺️ Drop Maps — Now 4X Bigger
Twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan.

The skill in here keeps climbing — players going from nothing to their first earnings and increasing there PR . So we're opening a market nobody's touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes — New Territory
We built the drop map market. We built loot routes. Now we're pioneering surge routes — free, like always.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt
Not a patch — a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan:
- When and where to rotate
- Where to base up
- What loot to grab first
- How to position for endgame

### 💜 Run `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop — it's what keeps this coming.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX

before.content:
# 🌊 Our Biggest Update Yet

The mission's never changed: give players what they need to win, free.

### 🗺️ Drop Maps — Now 4X Bigger
Twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan.

The skill in here keeps climbing — players going from nothing to their first earnings and increasing there PR . So we're opening a market nobody's touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes — New Territory
We built the drop map market. We built loot routes. Now we're pioneering surge routes — free, like always.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt
Not a patch — a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan:
- When and where to rotate
- Where to base up
- What loot efficiently like the pros
- How to position midgame for endgame

### 💜 Use Code `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop — it's what keeps this coming.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX (Server with loot routes + surge routes + tips and tricks)

after.content:
# 🌊 Our Biggest Update Yet
The mission's never changed: give players what they need to win, free.

### 🗺️ Drop Maps, Now 4X Bigger
Twice the markers, full coverage. Wherever you land, there's a plan.

The skill in here keeps climbing, with players going from nothing to their first earnings and increasing their PR. So we're opening a market nobody's touched.

### 🚀 Surge Routes, New Territory
We built the drop map market. We built loot routes. Now we're pioneering surge routes, free like always.

### 🔁 Loot Routes, Rebuilt
Not a patch, a full rebuild. Every route now comes with a complete game plan:
- When and where to rotate
- Where to base up
- How to loot efficiently like the pros
- How to position midgame for a strong endgame

### 💜 Use Code `WAVEDROPMAPS`
Drop the code in the shop. Your continued support is what makes all this possible and keeps it free for everyone.

🔗 discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX (Server with loot routes + surge routes + tips and tricks)
